articles.title: My favorite Govee smart lamps are at their lowest prices ever for Prime Day
articles.description: We've already rounded up the best Philips Hue deals of Prime Day, but if you're looking for something a little more budget-friendly, Govee's latest sale is worth checking out. The company has heavily discounted several of its color-changing smart lamps, including the Table Lamp 2 ($53.99, down from $79.99), Floor Lamp Basic ($59.99, regularly $99.99), the […]
articles.author: Sheena Vasani

articles.title: After covering Prime Day for 36 hours over four days, this is the one thing I bought
articles.description: We've covered so many deals during Prime Day that my head is spinning. But after four days of doing our damndest to try and help folks save money, the thing I'm most hyped for is a simple tool for fixing my most egregious mistakes. I bought a pair of Vampliers. If you're unfamiliar, Vampliers are […]
articles.author: Antonio G. Di Benedetto

articles.title: Our favorite Prime Day gadgets under $100 you don't need but will really want
articles.description: Prime Day has a funny way of convincing you to buy things you weren't shopping for in the first place. You sign on intending to buy something sensible you actually need, like a pack of USB-C cables, and an hour later you've also added a gadget that can press your coffee maker's power button and […]
articles.author: Sheena Vasani

articles.title: These are the best deals you can still get on MacBooks before Apple's price hike kicks in
articles.description: Apple just raised the prices on Macs and iPads in response to the rising costs of memory chips, right in the middle of Amazon Prime Day. That means existing discounts (even small ones) on Apple laptops like the MacBook Neo, MacBook Air, and MacBook Pro just became significantly better deals. As an example, the 13-inch […]
articles.author: Antonio G. Di Benedetto
